item.title: Good bye for now
item.description: I was arrested 2 years ago for possession of a large amount of mophine, co codamale and other prescription drugs. Since then I have gotten a job (I was unemployed at the time), got my own place (was living with a friend who is the one who called the cops). I have done everything I could have to better my self, the only thing I couldn't do was private rehab because I couldn't afford it. The prosecution wants 2 years. My solicitor thinks I'll get a suspended sentence. I keep trying to calm myself by repeating my mitigating circumstances. I was under 25 I am remorseful I have mental health issues Was the victim of sexual assault as a child I have great job prospects. I had a shit upbringing. In less than 24hrs I will know my fate. If this is it, thank you for making this app the place I go to to relax. If I don't post by this time tomorrow, well you'll know the outcome. Good bye for now. I love you guys I want to clarify, this is my first offence and I was not selling and the police know this. I was only charged with possession. I never had a desire to sell. EDIT: 1 hour to go
item.dc:creator: thetinymonarch

item.title: Image says it all
item.description: I used Imgur when I was deployed as well. It helps to laugh at shit posts. Even in 2009 Imgur was awesome. I come back to shitpost once in a while when I’m having a hard time. I had a feeling today I haven’t had in a while. I felt like I was about to be hit by something. That feeling is what started my panic attacks and my diagnoses after Iraq. Writing helps a lot. Thanks for reading
item.dc:creator: comingfromdistrict12

item.title: Yesterday in a fit of frustration about the state of things here in los Estados Unidos, I posted some of my drapings here instead of on meta. I didn’t know how you - imgur would respond- and i would say so far its been a mixed bag.
item.description:
But i am not a total newb here - and so I brought a banana for scale and I put it in a pocket because, yes- we are excited to see you ?
This is a silk and Australian wool blend herringbone woven that reads overall grey. Outstanding drape and hand.
item.dc:creator: thereoncewasamanfromnantucket

item.title: This is 100% flat farmland. The photographer took this photo from the plane window while over eastern Colorado. The snow drifts and snow melt on the crops had created an illusion of endless cubism.
item.description: credit user hoerr on reddit https://www.reddit.com/user/hoerr
item.dc:creator: psuedon

item.title: Resistance is quite easy on a local level
item.dc:creator: perarduaetal

item.title: Mentally healthy dump
item.description: I didn't organize this one as I generally do. Sometimes when I'm feeling a bit low I just don't post because I don't really have the energy to care enough to do it. However, I figure still it potentially could help more people than it could harm so, here we are. You don't have to be loved to have value. Just saying. -comet
item.dc:creator: iamthecomet

item.title: 4 years out of an abusive marriage
item.description: Adding an edit to say thank you to everyone, your kind words made me tear up! And to anyone going through something similar, I believe in you too ❤️

item.title: Friday night RAW (OC)
item.description: If you're interested in seeing more of my work, you can check out my Instagram: (update:soon to leave after publishing the book) https://www.instagram.com/gryzlock_comics/ Also, I'm in the process of publishing a book of my comics. If you'd like to support me with a $5 donation, I will include your name in it as a thank-you. Have a great day! Ko-fi.com/gryzlock Cheers.
item.dc:creator: gryzlock

item.title: Stupid timeline
item.description: My dad is convinced Biden was bad, Trump will bring good. Despite all the shit he's done already. "How can 70 million voters be wrong?" Well, dad, 44 mlion voted for Hitler so definitely a possibility. Edit: Thanks for the responses. I appreciate the various perspectives and experiences. I tried to respond to everyone, but theres just too many.
item.dc:creator: Mysocksnevermatch

item.title: They don't believe their own words, stop reacting like they do
item.description: Looks like it is time to re-post this essay. https://www.lilithsaintcrow.com/about-lili/on-civility/ TL;DR: Stop trying to reason with people who are smirking at you while slinging BS. They know they are lying, but they will never admit it, ever. That is the culture of white supremacists.
